session-wrap.name: session-wrap
session-wrap.description: Correct createSession / closeSession / cancelSession wrapping for any model mutation.

gui-log-error.name: gui-log-error
gui-log-error.description: Show an error dialog and also record it to the plugin log.
gui-log-error.body:
import com.nomagic.magicdraw.core.Application
import com.nomagic.magicdraw.utils.MDLog

def msg = 'Something went wrong: ' + reason
MDLog.getGeneralLog().error(msg, e)
Application.getInstance().getGUILog().showError(msg)

finder-by-qname.name: finder-by-qname
finder-by-qname.description: Resolve an element by qualified name using Finder.

finder-by-type.name: finder-by-type
finder-by-type.description: Collect all elements of a given type beneath an owner, recursively.
finder-by-type.body:
import com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.Finder
import com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element

Class<?>[] types = new Class<?>[]{ someType.class }
Collection<Element> hits = Finder.byTypeRecursively().find(owner, types, false)

headless-detect.name: headless-detect
headless-detect.description: Guard GUI-only code paths when a script is launched outside the MagicDraw UI.

association-ends.name: association-ends
association-ends.description: Read both ends of an Association. end[0] is source, end[1] is target.
